title: simplywire - Retro 4 Unit Milk Bottle Holder – Wine Bottle Carrier – Black Flat Wire
features: SMART DESIGN: This retro style milk bottle holder is perfect for both carrying and storing glass bottles. Featuring 4 compartments it is perfect for sitting by your front-door for deliveries.
SPACE SAVER: The compartments are wide enough to hold glass milk, juice, wine, or cordial bottles, 1 litre Tetra Pak cartons, 2-pint plastic milk cartons and much more.
STRONG AND DURABLE: A robust flat wire creates a solid protective frame for your bottles. The black powder coating provides added weather protection with a comfortable rubber wood handle.
VERSATILE: Suitable to leave on your doorstep ready for the milkman delivery; carrying your vintage wines from the cellar or simply displaying your condiments on the kitchen table.
MEASUREMENTS: Height: 27cm x Width: 20cm x Depth: 20cm.
description: Product Description Quality Commitment At simplywire, our focus is on producing a range of quality products and bespoke designs for modern living. Quality materials, production and service are at the heart of everything that we do. Product Description Expertly Designed Our stylish simplywire milk bottle carriers are the ideal way to store, carry and display bottles. It is perfect for use outside for your morning delivery, use it for additional bottles you need to store, or on the kitchen counter for display purposes. Masterfully Crafted simplywire partners with highly respected manufacturers from around the world. We love our products and we test them rigorously to make sure they perform perfectly. We believe it is our responsibility to source and create the best products to ensure they are safe whilst remaining stylish and practical. Stylish and Durable Storage This bottle rack is made from flat and round steel wire and then black powder coated, giving it a great retro look, perfect for many decors and styles. It also features a sleek, branded and varnished rubber wood handle. This product is available in medium (4 compartments) and large (6 compartments). Easy Cleaning The unit is designed with easy clean properties and can be wiped clean with a soft cloth. Do not use abrasive cleaners. Please note that the drinks shown in the picture are for marketing purposes and not included.
